title: corylopsis alnifolia
intro: Corylopsis alnifolia, also known as the yellow winter hazel, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Corylopsis alnifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
